gold: Anna, son transferinde biraz gecikme olmuştu. Son transferimi bir gösterir misin? Bana email gönderir misin son transferin detaylarını?

sigWerErrors.reason: The suffix changes the possessive from 'in' (your transfer) to 'im' (my transfer), which changes the meaning of the sentence regarding whose transfer is being discussed.
The suffix changes the possessive from 'in' (your transfer) to 'im' (my transfer), which changes the meaning of the sentence regarding whose transfer details are being requested.
